reviews.review_description: I didn't know what to do and nobody was playing...

Hey guys this is a little weird but I’m one of the devs you guys know me as dary uhh I’m the games animator and mod and lots of other stuff but I love this game because the gameplay it has to offer and builds a variety of friendships and the community is very wholesome whenever I play it’s a great experience cause I get the chance to help all the new people in the game!!!

I just got it today when it was released and for a game that’s been out for one day it’s a really fun game to play on and the moderators are so kind aswell btw if the admin/mod is reading this I’m the one who u taught how to play😅 anyway I’m not tryna be that guy but I’ve always wanted to be a moderator in a game and I was wondering if I could apply for one 🙂
It’s completely fine if not btw

reviews.review_title: A really Good horror gorrila tag style g

reviews.review_description: I legit joined after they remade the spawn area and after i went to shop and came back some of the map wasn’t loaded. Now i get it a kid made this game i don’t blame em but one of the mods there kicked me once i thought it was a mistake and it was kinda hard to hear him due to the mic being quiet and other people talking over so i did a little bit of horror left and the next day went to play again and it said i was banned i legit did nothing wrong so idk what was going on that mods head but i did nothing wrong please do something about that as that’s just kinda stupid to just randomly ban someone.

reviews.review_title: Sorry for the bad review before  this
reviews.review_description: I am sorry for the bad review before this but  before I put in the co-owner joined a lobby and starred cursing at me and said how he knows shrek and could ban me In big scary but I figured out thanks to popo that they on sat and sun they just go around kicking people also when did I say the n word

developer_response.body: didnt you say the n-word like 5 times???

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing and scary 😱 I love it 5atars!
Everything is so great about this game lots of effort put into making it
Great game if only it had more levels and more servers it would be a full W lol
